message:
refactor(tests): migrate tailer, recorder_migration, undo, wezterm, cleanup from tokio::test to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Convert 111 #[tokio::test] async tests across 5 files to #[test] with
run_async_test helper backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder:
- tailer.rs: 10 tests
- recorder_migration.rs: 26 tests
- undo.rs: 14 tests (note: file had 27 tokio attrs but 14 unique async tests)
- wezterm.rs: 33 tests (across 3 test modules: tests, mock_tests, unified_tests)
- cleanup.rs: 32 tests

wezterm.rs also adds run_async_test_paused for start_paused=true tests
(gated behind #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))]).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
